# CGPDFScannerScan(_:)

**Function**

Parses the content stream of a PDF scanner object.

## Declaration

```swift
func CGPDFScannerScan(_ scanner: CGPDFScannerRef) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **scanner**: The scanner object whose content stream you want to parse.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the entire stream is parsed successfully; [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if parsing fails (for example, if the stream data is corrupted).

## Discussion

The function [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFScannerScan(_:)] parses the PDF content stream associated with the scanner. Each time Core Graphics parses a PDF operator for which you register a callback, Core Graphics invokes your callback.

## Parsing Content

- **CGPDFScannerGetContentStream(_:)**: Returns the content stream associated with a PDF scanner object.
